system.specialQuality: bound to within a few miles of her bones; can’t form new memories; leaves no footprints

selected: to drag others into her search

system.moves:
- Manifest in moonlight as a pale, bedraggled woman
- Ask for help, insist on it
- Grow ever more agitated, flickering and vibrating as she does
- Vent her rage with a deafening wail, d10 damage (near, area, loud, reload, ignores armor)
- Vanish when no one’s looking

Those who ply the Great Wood (page 200) tell an old tale of a bride, newly married to a handsome trapper. He failed to come home one night, and she unwisely entered the forest to find him, falling into a deep pond and drowning. Ever since, her ghost has roamed the woods on moonlit nights: wet and shivering, desperate and pleading, certain that her husband is still out there.
